query:
UPDATE games SET
  -- Model scores
  modelAwayScore = 3.56,
  modelHomeScore = 4.64,
  -- Model moneyline (no-vig, rounded to whole numbers)
  modelAwayML = '+162',
  modelHomeML = '-162',
  -- Model win probabilities
  modelAwayWinPct = 38.16,
  modelHomeWinPct = 61.84,
  -- Model spread odds (home is favored: CHC -1.5)
  -- awayBookSpread = +1.5 (WSH), homeBookSpread = -1.5 (CHC)
  -- Engine: away RL (WSH +1.5) odds = -121, home RL (CHC -1.5) odds = +121
  modelAwaySpreadOdds = '-121',
  modelHomeSpreadOdds = '+121',
  -- Run line
  awayRunLine = '+1.5',
  homeRunLine = '-1.5',
  awayRunLineOdds = '-121',
  homeRunLineOdds = '+121',
  -- Model total
  modelTotal = 7.0,
  modelOverRate = 52.43,
  modelUnderRate = 37.00,
  -- Model over/under odds
  modelOverOdds = '-110',
  modelUnderOdds = '+170',
  -- Edge fields (away_ml edge +5.16pp, away_rl edge +2.31pp, over edge +1.35pp)
  spreadEdge = 'WSH +1.5',
  spreadDiff = 2.31,
  totalEdge = 'OVER 7.0',
  totalDiff = 1.35,
  -- Published
  publishedModel = 1,
  modelRunAt = UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
WHERE id = 2250009;
